name: STRANGER THINGS AU
description:
Test run was started 1/3/2025 and is going to continue, to have newer results, it's better to restart a new chat to get the updates.

Expect things to be messy or unprofessional. Doing my best to make it as enjoyable to talk with as possible. With this some characters maybe out of place in locations or later I might decide just to make a AU where the characters such as Eleven and Will actually stay in Hawkins and don't move. Some characters don't have descriptions listed and more are going to be added. If the Ai can't manage handling all the character's some might have to be removed, but I'll keep the ones that people know very well.

Credits

Stranger Things Wiki Characters
creator: Ibara-Chan
